top_signals.title: Al Hammoury: Gold and Energy Hedges Remain Important
top_signals.summary: Equiti Group Chief Market Strategist Noureldeen Al Hammoury believes gold and energy hedges remain important because markets are underpricing the risk of a longer geopolitical inflation cycle. He speaks with Haslinda Amin on "Insight with Haslinda Amin." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: How Can Lebanon’s Partners Help Strengthen the Lebanese Armed Forces?
top_signals.summary:
The Lebanese state’s lack of effective sovereignty is a crucial problem in efforts to negotiate with Israel and disarm Hizballah. In response to intensified fighting between Israel and Hizballah, the United States began hosting talks between Israel and the Lebanese government in April. However, fighting has continued, and Hizballah recently rejected a proposed ceasefire deal.In 2025, in a historic move, the Lebanese government made plans for the Lebanese Armed Forces to disarm Hizballah. However, the military made slow progress, partly due to fears that more aggressive moves might splinter the Lebanese forces. Meanwhile, Israeli attacks have killed dozens of members

The post How Can Lebanon’s Partners Help Strengthen the Lebanese Armed Forces? appeared first on War on the Rocks.
